baseline_lock.branch_execution_rule: Apply LookA only on a copy-branch map after P2 preflight.

forbidden_change_surface: high quality render without explicit P3 authorization

material_parameters.allowed_direction: clear mineral off-white and light neutral gray, low saturation, no warm gold bounce
cool light-gray stone with subtle titanium highlights
matte black iron or gunmetal with restrained roughness
transparent acrylic, clear glass, titanium silver metal, and cool crystal accents
deep red, cobalt blue, matte black, milk white, and transparent crystal only
transparent crystal, readable silhouette, no amber tint

directional_light.intent: cool soft key that reveals the DNA bonsai without black silhouette

sky_light.intent: neutral fill to keep glass and acrylic readable

exposure_parameters.intent: stable preview exposure with visible DNA helix and node color separation

white_balance_parameters.intent: cool neutral life-science workshop balance; preserve titanium silver, clear glass, cobalt blue, deep red, matte black, milk white, and transparent crystal separation

camera_parameters.composition_goal: 3:4 vertical subject safe area within a 1920x1080-or-lower preview
camera_parameters.depth_of_field: off for P1; mild only in P2 if the DNA helix remains legible

next_safe_action: No execution while current free memory is below P1. When P2 is available, duplicate the baseline map into a LookA branch and apply one small material/light/camera batch, then preview.
